message:
🐛 Fix transparent AI suggestion dropdown background (#1619)

* 🐛 Fix transparent glass backgrounds across all themes

All 28 themes used rgba with alpha < 1.0 for glassBackground,
causing every glass element (modals, cards, navbar, sidebar) to
show content bleeding through. Convert all glassBackground values
from rgba to rgb for fully opaque solid backgrounds.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix send button truncated by sidebar viewport

Add flex-shrink-0 to all three send buttons (running, failed, default
states) so they don't get squeezed out of the sidebar. Also add
overflow-hidden to the input wrapper to prevent edge overflow.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix transparent AI suggestion dropdown background

Use priority-colored background (bg-red-950, bg-orange-950, etc.)
instead of bg-card for the MissionSuggestions dropdown. The bg-card
color was too similar to the page background, making content behind
the dropdown visually bleed through. Also add isolation: isolate
to create a new stacking context.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
